roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC1170,18 (PROP 47) MOTION/NP/X:NOT REPORTED/PET PROP47//PET GRTD/X  THE COURT REDUCES THE FELONY OFFENSETO  A MISDEMEANOR/CTORD  ANY RESTITUTION FINE PREVIOUSLY ORDERED THATS GREATER THAN $150 IS HEREBY REDUCED TO $150/CTORD: ANY BASE FINE PREVIOUSLY ORDERED THAT IS GREATER THAN $250 IS HEREBY REDUCED TO $250/X: ORDER FOR RESENTENCING OR RECLASSIFICATION (PENAL CODE SECTION 1170,18)SIGNED ANDFILED/
